channel.title: Places on Wheeler Genealogy
channel.description: Recent content in Places on Wheeler Genealogy

item.title: A Health Check on My WheelerMcGinty GEDCOM
item.description: A quick, data-driven snapshot of my current GEDCOM export—tree size, top surname clusters, place hubs, and the cleanup tasks that make the stories stronger.

item.title: What My GEDCOM Reveals: A Snapshot of the WheelerMcGinty Tree
item.description: A quick, data-driven snapshot of my WheelerMcGinty GEDCOM—top surnames, geographic hubs, and the cleanup tasks that make the stories stronger.
